ddls:
CREATE TABLE "appliance_energy_usage" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption record */,
  "appliance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the appliance */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "whirlpool_double_door" REAL /* Energy consumed by the Whirlpool doubledoor appliance */,
  "godrej_minifridge" REAL /* Energy consumed by the Godrej minifridge appliance */,
  "total_energy_consumed" REAL /* Total energy consumed by both appliances */,
  "record_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone in which the data was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Flag to mark records that need further review or have been flagged for anomalies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appliance_energy_usage_appliance_id FOREIGN KEY ("appliance_id") REFERENCES appliances ("appliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appliance_energy_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appliances" (
  "appliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appliance */,
  "appliance_name" TEXT /* Name of the appliance */,
  "appliance_type" TEXT /* Type of the appliance */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the appliance is installed */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the appliance */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the appliance */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the appliance was installed */,
  "warranty_expiration" TEXT /* Warranty expiration date */,
  "energy_efficiency_rating" TEXT /* Energy efficiency rating of the appliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appliances_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption target */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the target is set */,
  "appliance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the appliance for which the target is set */,
  "target_energy_consumption" REAL /* Target energy consumption value */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the target period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the target period */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of target (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "target_status" TEXT /* Status of the target (e.g., active, completed, missed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_targets_appliance_id FOREIGN KEY ("appliance_id") REFERENCES appliances ("appliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_targets_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_targets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the energy consumption record triggering the alert */,
  "appliance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the appliance related to the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., threshold exceeded, system malfunction) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "acknowledged_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who acknowledged the alert */,
  "acknowledged_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was acknowledged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES appliance_energy_usage ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_acknowledged_by FOREIGN KEY ("acknowledged_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_appliance_id FOREIGN KEY ("appliance_id") REFERENCES appliances ("appliance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location for which the report is generated */,
  "appliance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the appliance for which the report is generated */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* Period covered by the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "created_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Flag to mark if the report has been archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_appliance_id FOREIGN KEY ("appliance_id") REFERENCES appliances ("appliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who earned the reward */,
  "milestone" TEXT /* Description of the energy-saving milestone achieved */,
  "reward_details" TEXT /* Details of the reward */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the reward was issued */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., gift card, discount) */,
  "reward_value" REAL /* Value of the reward */,
  "redeemed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who redeemed the reward */,
  "redeemed_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reward was redeemed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_redeemed_by FOREIGN KEY ("redeemed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., owner, tenant, manager) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to mark if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "smart_home_integration" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration record */,
  "appliance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the appliance being integrated */,
  "smart_home_device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the smart home device */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., automatic adjustment, manual control) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date when the integration was set up */,
  "last_sync_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last sync */,
  "sync_status" TEXT /* Status of the last sync (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_smart_home_integration_appliance_id FOREIGN KEY ("appliance_id") REFERENCES appliances ("appliance_id")
)
